name: Tongyu Communication Inc.
summary: Tongyu Communication Inc. manufactures and sells base station antennas for use in the mobile communication network worldwide. Its primary products include various kinds of base station antennas; microwave antennas; small/low profile antennas; RF components; and indoor and outdoor antennas, as well as small cells. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Zhongshan, China.
